source_pr.title: *: Move statement tests to executor package

symptoms: r := tk.MustQuery("select * from select_order_test where id = 1 order by id limit 1 offset 0;") (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: r := tk.MustQuery("select * from select_order_test where id = 1 order by id limit 1 offset 0;") (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: r := tk.MustQuery("select * from select_order_test where id = 1 order by id limit 1 offset 0;") (executor/executor_test.go)
